all_games.summary: Shota Imanaga dominated on the mound, striking out nine Cubs batters over six scoreless innings. Bryan Reynolds' solo homer proved to be the difference-maker in a low-scoring affair.
The Diamondbacks edged out the Phillies in a back-and-forth contest. Brandon Marsh's three-run homer proved to be the decisive blow, but both teams' bullpens struggled to contain the damage.
Keider Montero pitched a gem for the Tigers, shutting down the Marlins over six scoreless innings. Javier Báez's solo homer was the only offense the Marlins could muster.
The Angels exploded for 10 runs, led by Jorge Soler's four-RBI performance. The Reds' offense was unable to keep pace, falling behind early and never recovering.
The Blue Jays' offense was too much for the Twins, with Ryan Jeffers' three-RBI performance leading the charge. The Twins' bullpen struggled to contain the damage, allowing nine runs.
The Athletics' offense was quiet, but their pitching was more than enough to secure the win. The Mets were unable to muster any offense, falling behind early and never recovering.

all_games.game: New York Yankees @ Tampa Bay Rays
all_games.summary: The Rays' offense was too much for the Yankees, with Yandy Díaz's two-RBI performance leading the charge. Steven Matz pitched well for the Yankees, but it wasn't enough to secure the win.
The Giants' offense was enough to secure the win, with Willy Adames' two-RBI performance leading the charge. The Orioles struggled to contain the damage, falling behind early and never recovering.

all_games.top_batting_line: Ronald Acuña Jr.: 2 H, 1 HR, 2 RBI
all_games.summary: The Braves' offense was too much for the Guardians, with Ronald Acuña Jr.'s two-RBI performance leading the charge. The Braves' bullpen struggled to contain the damage, allowing five runs.

all_games.game: Chicago White Sox @ Kansas City Royals
all_games.summary: Kris Bubic pitched a gem for the Royals, striking out 11 White Sox batters over seven scoreless innings. Carter Jensen's solo homer was the only offense the White Sox could muster.
The Nationals' offense was enough to secure the win, with Jake Bauers' three-RBI performance leading the charge. Jake Irvin pitched well for the Nationals, but it wasn't enough to secure the win.

all_games.game: Boston Red Sox @ St. Louis Cardinals
all_games.summary: The Cardinals' offense was just enough to secure the win, with Connelly Early pitching well in relief. The Red Sox struggled to contain the damage, falling behind early and never recovering.
Gavin Sheets' two-homer performance led the Rockies' offense, but it wasn't enough to secure the win. The Padres' bullpen struggled to contain the damage, allowing five runs.
The Mariners' offense was too much for the Astros, with Yordan Alvarez's three-RBI performance leading the charge. Emerson Hancock pitched well for the Astros, but it wasn't enough to secure the win.

The Dodgers' offense was just enough to secure the win, with Corey Seager's three-RBI performance leading the charge. Kumar Rocker pitched well for the Rangers, but it wasn't enough to secure the win.
